quickActions.title: Add a decision
quickActions.prompt: I want to record a design decision. Use the design-support skill (add mode).

quickActions.title: Propose a hypothesis
quickActions.prompt: I want to propose a hypothesis. Use the design-support skill (hypothesis mode).

quickActions.title: What did we rule out?
quickActions.prompt: Show me what we ruled out and what it affected — the cascade reports from refuted hypotheses.

quickActions.title: Generate status report
quickActions.prompt: Generate an internal status report using the design-support skill.

quickActions.title: Show whitespots
quickActions.prompt: Show me the current gaps and whitespots. Use the design-support skill (triage mode).
